name: agent-reviewer
description: Clone your team's best code reviewers. Reads their PR review history in context, extracts a persona per reviewer — what they care about, what they catch, how they sound — and runs them as a code-review panel. Personas, not rule lists.

interface.shortDescription: Clone your team's best reviewers from their PR history and run them as a review panel.
interface.longDescription: Agent Reviewer turns your team's pull-request review history into a panel of code-review agents. It ranks the people who do the reviews that matter, collects each one's comments in context (the diff they were left on, the PR's intent), and extracts a persona per reviewer — what they care about, what they catch that others miss, what they let slide, and how they sound — rather than a deterministic rule list. Each persona becomes a reviewer agent; run them together as a panel on a diff or PR. Inspired by Base44's commit-history onboarding prompt: look at the history and find what the people working on this codebase cared deeply about.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Reviewer to find the prominent reviewers in this repo.
Use Agent Reviewer to extract a persona from a reviewer's PR history.
Use Agent Reviewer to review my current changes with the team's reviewer panel.
